target_deployment_id.description: The uuidV4 identifier of the target deployment.

package_id.description: A uuidV4 identifier of the source package.

app_version.description: The app version (e.g., 1.0.0) that this update targets.

description.description: A description of the update to display in the release history.

disabled.description: If set to true, disables the package immediately after upload.

mandatory.description: If set to true, marks the update as mandatory for all users.

rollout.description: The percentage (0–100) of users to gradually roll the update out to.
